title: draba abajoensis
intro: Draba abajoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. It is a type of wild mustard that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Draba abajoensis is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health issues such as skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, and may also help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being.
